data.body: Investigation (2026-03-30): All 12 CI failures are intentional TDD RED tests awaiting GREEN implementation (7 in test_project_setup_ci_autodetection.py for task dso-bwtp, 5 in test_brainstorm_gap_analysis.py for gap analysis feature). These are not regressions — they are RED markers in .test-index. CI will pass once the corresponding GREEN tasks complete.
